label: Library
summary: Misuse of standard or third-party library surfaces.

rules.label: Aws Credential Hardcoded
rules.description: `credentials.NewStaticCredentials("AKID...", "secret...", "")` with literal access keys
rules.explanation: In Go, Aws Credential Hardcoded matters because the pattern here, `credentials.NewStaticCredentials("AKID...", "secret...", "")` with literal access keys, hides a sensitive edge where convenience shortcuts can become security or data-handling incidents.
rules.fix: For Aws Credential Hardcoded in Go, pull the sensitive value from env, config, or a secret manager instead of embedding it directly in source.

rules.label: Aws Session Per Request

rules.explanation: In Go, Aws Session Per Request matters because the pattern here, `session.NewSession()` or `config.LoadDefaultConfig(ctx)` inside handler functions, pushes configuration or startup ownership into the wrong phase of the program.
rules.fix: For Aws Session Per Request in Go, load, validate, and wire this configuration at startup so request paths and imports only consume already-owned state.
